hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then cd /Users/yutaka/dev/app/shopping_ai/backend && uv run ruff check "$f" --fix && uv run ruff format "$f"; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then cd /Users/yutaka/dev/app/shopping_ai/frontend && npx eslint "$f"; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
